subject: Blitzle, a small black-and-white striped horse-like Pokemon, standing on a floating ice floe in open water with clouds and a distant icy shore
description: A small, stylized horse-like Pokemon with black body and white lightning-bolt-shaped stripes stands on a chunk of floating ice in the middle of a body of open water. Its mane stands upright in a spiky formation. The figure is viewed from the side. The water is rendered in flat teal-blue tones, and the ice beneath the creature is white. In the left background, a small round pink creature is visible in the water — too small to identify with confidence. A distant icy shoreline and bare tree are visible at the right edge. The sky above has white clouds on blue. The art style is flat and illustrative, consistent with Pokemon CG illustration. The isolated island-of-ice setting gives the scene a solitary, vast-open-world feeling.
foreground: Blitzle standing on a floating ice floe; open water surrounding it
background: Open water, distant icy shore with bare tree, cloudy blue sky; small pink creature in background water
emotion: Solitary and self-possessed; poised on precarious ground
